narrative:
Jefferson North (precinct in Fayette County) has 348 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 41.4 percentage points.
